name: Smack
description: Quantized live-loop Audio FX with 26 seeded per-slice glitch effects, slice reordering, A/B punch, and hands-on performance controls

smack.name: Smack
smack.description: Quantized live-loop Audio FX with 26 seeded per-slice glitch effects, slice reordering, A/B punch, and hands-on performance controls

smack-in.name: Smack In
smack-in.description: Standalone mic, line, or USB-C loop Voice with 26 seeded per-slice glitch effects, Pad Play, and a browser step editor

oversmack.name: Oversmack
oversmack.description: Full-surface Smack input looper with whole-grid step-FX editing, palette pinning, pressure punch effects, and dual-mono lanes
